name: State and Local Law Enforcement Reimbursement

eligibility.description: Limited to state or local law enforcement agencies that substantially contribute to the recovery of federal taxes; cannot be duplicative of other federal/state forfeiture programs.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: State and local agencies can be reimbursed for up to 10% of recovered federal taxes resulting from information they provide regarding illegal drug activities or related money laundering.
